Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm used to being accosted by people, but recently I had an interesting encounter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It was a young man not much older than you. Do you know what he said to me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 5 13 16 5 113}I thought the same thing, so I asked him to repeat himself.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But sure enough, that's what he said. I was shocked someone would actually thank me for selling fake products.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 16 15 113}I'm not proud of this or anything, but I couldn't care less what our customers think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Don't you know who I am? I'm the president of a company that sells fake products![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But then, he told me he quit his part-time job and was going to study to become a public prosecutor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}He wants to punish businessmen like me for bending the rules.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}He said I was an example of a negative role model, even though I wasn't aware of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Maybe I'm overreacting, but what if he does become a public prosecutor and puts me behind bars?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I suppose that means I wouldn't be able to give you my advice anymore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I understand him a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...My shareholders oughta take a leaf out of that boy's book.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Apparently, kids these days aren't as naive as we thought...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late, so I'll go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
